'''savungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docarpamine|docarpamine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docarpamine|docarpamine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| savungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sævingith|sævingith]] || [[word:sævingij|sævingij]] || [[word:sævingish|sævingish]] || [[word:sævingi|sævingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:savuvunguth|savuvunguth]] || [[word:savuvunguj|savuvunguj]] || [[word:savuvungush|savuvungush]] || [[word:savuvungu|savuvungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:savunguth|savunguth]] || [[word:savunguj|savunguj]] || [[word:savungush|savungush]] || [[word:savungu|savungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:savufngufth|savufngufth]] || [[word:savufngufj|savufngufj]] || [[word:savufngufsh|savufngufsh]] || [[word:savufnguf|savufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:savunguthu|savunguthu]] || [[word:savunguju|savunguju]] || [[word:savungushu|savungushu]] || [[word:savunguku|savunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:savunguth|savunguth]] || [[word:savunguj|savunguj]] || [[word:savungush|savungush]] || [[word:savungu|savungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:savunguthul|savunguthul]] || [[word:savungujul|savungujul]] || [[word:savungushul|savungushul]] || [[word:savungukul|savungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:savunguuthuthu|savunguuthuthu]] || [[word:savunguujuju|savunguujuju]] || [[word:savunguushushu|savunguushushu]] || [[word:savunguuku|savunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:savunguthun|savunguthun]] || [[word:savungujun|savungujun]] || [[word:savungushun|savungushun]] || [[word:savungukun|savungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:savunguthuoro|savunguthuoro]] || [[word:savungujuoro|savungujuoro]] || [[word:savungushuoro|savungushuoro]] || [[word:savungukuoro|savungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
